name: Broadcom Layer7 API Gateway Management API
description: Broadcom Layer7 API Gateway REST Management API (RESTMAN) for managing gateway entities including services, policies, cluster-wide properties, certificates, JDBC connections, encapsulated assertions, and other gateway configuration objects.
